response.title: Senior Marketing Manager
response.description: As a Senior Marketing Manager at Innovative Marketing Solutions, you will lead the strategic planning and execution of our marketing initiatives. You will work collaboratively with cross-functional teams to drive brand awareness, customer engagement, and revenue growth. This role requires a strong analytical mindset and a passion for marketing trends and technologies.

required_skills: 5+ years of experience in a marketing management role
Proficiency in SEO and SEM strategies
Expertise in data analytics tools (e.g. Google Analytics, Tableau)
Strong understanding of CRM software (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot)
Experience in managing multi-channel marketing campaigns (digital, social, email)
Ability to create and manage budgets for marketing projects
Proven leadership and team management experience
preferred_skills: Familiarity with marketing automation tools (e.g. Marketo, Pardot)
Knowledge of content marketing best practices
Experience with A/B testing and conversion rate optimization
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field; MBA preferred
